name: rig
description: rig — a quality-gated AI workbench for Claude Code. Give /rig:go (the main entry) a natural-language task: it classifies the task, runs it in an isolated git worktree, and checks the result against an acceptance gate — the diff only lands in your working tree on an explicit accept. Track parallel tasks with /rig:go board; compose recipes, personas, and knowledge as reusable bricks.
